title: Kan: Israel 'jointly preparing with Washington for war's resumption' — doubts Iran deal
snippet: Times of Israel reports Israeli Kan broadcaster citing a senior security official: Israel is 'jointly preparing with Washington for the resumption of war.' Israel doubts a deal with Iran will be reached. The report suggests Israel-US military coordination continues in parallel with diplomatic efforts, signaling both countries are maintaining military readiness.
tag_reason: 이스라엘-미국의 전쟁 재개 공동 준비와 이란 합의 회의론은 Kan 방송사의 고위 안보 관계자 인용으로, 이전에 보도되지 않은 완전히 새로운 정보.
